title: Bulldog's Pack
description: Bulldog's Pack is a carefully curated selection of performance, focused mods designed to optimize your Minecraft experience!
body:
## The Bulldog's Pack

 Bulldog's Pack is a practical performance oriented mod collection that focuses on making Minecraft run smoother without changing the way the game plays. By selecting only lightweight mods that address common performance such as chunk loading, entity handling, and resource management, the pack helps reduce frame‑rate drops!
### What's Included
- Smooth Animations
- Skin Changer
- Many shaderpacks
- Sound Mods
- Tweaks
